name: tibco-vectordb-scroll
title: Scroll Documents
description: Paginate through documents without a query vector. Ideal for memory iteration.

display.name: VectorDB Connection
display.description: Select the VectorDB connector to use

display.name: Default Collection
display.description: Fallback collection name when not provided in the activity input

input.name: filters
input.schema: {"type": "object", "description": "Key-value filter map. Keys are payload field names. Values can be string, number, boolean, or array (for 'in' match). Example: {\"category\":\"tech\",\"year\":2024,\"tags\":[\"rag\",\"llm\"]}", "additionalProperties": true}

output.name: documents
output.schema: {"type": "array", "items": {"type": "object", "properties": {"id": {"type": "string", "description": "Document ID"}, "content": {"type": "string", "description": "Source text"}, "vector": {"type": "array", "items": {"type": "number"}, "description": "Embedding vector (if withVectors=true)"}, "payload": {"type": "object", "description": "Metadata key-value pairs"}}}}
